case_title: GEET PRASAD ET AL VS. DOMINIC G. FLAMIANO ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-27-2019 CONTINUED TO APR-10-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRASAD, GEET PRASAD, MAHENDRA AS TO DEFENDANT FLAMIANO, DOMINIC G. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-27-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-26-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-04-2019

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-10-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-20-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2019 CONTINUED TO AUG-20-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ** NOTE: THIS CASE IS SUBJECT TO DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B) IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE ON THE NEXT HEARING DATE AND COMPLIANCE. ** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST WILLIAM EUGENE GILG, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-21-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-05-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100049639)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-21-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-20-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Court notes dismissal on file; takes action off calendar. All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2019 Continued To Aug-20-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Aug-20-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
